# OpenAPI 3.1 fixture set

Small, self-contained JSON fixtures that collectively cover the major OpenAPI 3.1.1 object surface.

- `01-minimal.json`: minimal valid document with `paths`
- `02-root-info-servers-tags.json`: root-level metadata objects
- `03-operations-parameters-request-body.json`: operations, parameters, request bodies, media/encoding
- `04-responses-links-callbacks.json`: responses, headers, examples, links, callbacks
- `05-components-and-references.json`: all component maps and `$ref` usage
- `06-security-schemes-and-requirements.json`: security schemes and requirements
- `07-webhooks-and-path-items.json`: top-level `webhooks` and reusable `pathItems`
- `08-schema-json-schema-2020-12.json`: Schema Object + JSON Schema 2020-12 features
- `09-spec-extensions-and-external-docs.json`: specification extensions and docs links
